name: Improvement or proposal

> Please read `TEMPLATE_USAGE.md` before opening an issue.

### What problem does this solve?
Explain the limitation or friction you encountered.

### Proposed change
Describe the change or addition you’re suggesting.

### Scope
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Template structure
- [ ] Workflow guidance
- [ ] IDE-specific guide

### Alternatives considered (optional)
Briefly mention other approaches you considered.

### Impact
Who benefits from this change and why?
